results.title: Senate grants Trump victory after it refuses to advance new Iran war powers resolution
results.description: The news comes as President Donald Trump bragged about a framework agreement with Tehran set to be signed on Friday in Geneva.

results.title: Primary election: Measure V looks doomed; Thompson, Jones advance; Davis poised to win judicial race
results.description: At the two week mark since the June 2 primary election, the Yolo County Elections Office has processed the majority of the ballots it received.

results.title: State Supreme Court candidates return $37K to donors with primary vote unnecessary | Washington
results.description: (The Center Square) – Two judges vying for an open Washington Supreme Court seat refunded donors roughly $37,000 after the race advanced to November without the need for an August primary vote, state records show. Five of the nine seats on the bench are up for election ahead of a ruling on the state’s new [...] The post State Supreme Court candidates return $37K to donors with primary vote unnecessary | Washington appeared first on CBNC .

results.title: In response to advocates, supervisors agree to review authority over detention centers
results.description: In response to repeated pleas from residents and advocates, the Kern County Board of Supervisors agreed to review and clarify the county's authority when it comes to the several immigration detention centers in the county.
